name: yuzu-quic-spike-server
description: Throwaway msquic echo server for #376 PR 0 spike
_comment_baseline: Pinned to the same vcpkg baseline as the root manifest so re-running the spike picks the same msquic version (2.4.8) the original evidence captured. Without this pin, vcpkg resolves against HEAD and silent version drift invalidates the audit-evidence README. Bump in lockstep with the root vcpkg.json baseline (governance round 5 build-ci S1 / UP-49).
